CVE-2023-49721.title: An insecure default to allow UEFI Shell in EDK2 was left enabled  ...
CVE-2023-49721.description: An insecure default to allow UEFI Shell in EDK2 was left enabled in LXD. This allows an OS-resident attacker to bypass Secure Boot.
